title: valeriana parviflora
intro: Valeriana parviflora, also known as the small-flowered valerian or small-flowered valerian root, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Valerianaceae family. It is commonly used for its medicinal properties, including its sedative and anti-anxiety effects, due to the presence of valerenic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Valeriana parviflora include promoting relaxation, reducing stress and anxiety, and improving sleep quality, making it a popular natural remedy for insomnia and restlessness. Valeriana parviflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
